description: Create a main.py CLI script at the root to wrap parent_graph.invoke().

userStories.title: Create main.py CLI Entry Point
userStories.description: As a JobStream operator, I want to run the application via a simple main.py entry point so that I can trigger the job pipeline from the command line without manually editing Python files.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Running the JobStream map-reduce pipeline from the terminal
Given the system is configured and data/job_tracker.json exists
When I execute `python main.py` or `uv run main.py`
Then the script configures the checkpointer and invokes the `parent_graph`

tasks.description: Create main.py at the project root
Set up SqliteSaver checkpointer for state persistence (e.g. data/checkpoints.sqlite)
Invoke the parent_graph with initial empty state and thread config
Add basic terminal output/logging to indicate the start and end of processing
